DialogueSystem
Table of Contents

Namespace WolverineSoft.DialogueSystem

Classes

AdvanceContext

Context that is passed into the DialogueManager to retrieve the next dialogue. Contains values relevant to the player's interaction and is used By redirects to determine next dialogue. An instance of AdvanceParams should be created by your frontend of the Dialogue System

BasicOption
ChoiceObject

Scriptable Object representing a Choice Dialogue

ChoiceParameters

Base class representing the parameters used by Choice Dialogue

DSEvent

Scriptable Object representing a non-typed Dialogue Event

DSEventAudioClip
DSEventBase
DSEventBool
DSEventFloat
DSEventInt
DSEventString
DSEvent<T>

abstract class for Scriptable Object representing a typed Dialogue Event

DialogueAsset

ScriptableObject representing the main asset of a DialogueGraph and the first Trace when starting a dialogue

DialogueInfo

Class used to provide data from the backend of the Dialogue system to the UI. Uses Getter functions to retrieve params of your derived type

DialogueManager

Primary Component for operating the Backend of the Dialogue System. Primary functions are BeginDialogue(DialogueAsset, string) and AdvanceDialogue(AdvanceContext). EndDialogue() Is only to be used when ending an interaction prematurely. Also provides interfaces for values and keywords

DialogueObject

Base class for ScriptableObjects that are part of the path traced by the DialogueManager

DialogueParameters

Base class representing the Settings for an overall interaction. Provided via the DialogueManager

EventCaller

class Holding information for a call to a non-types DSEvent

EventCaller<T>

class Holding information for a call to a non-types DSEvent

EventObject
EventReference

Base class for EventCaller and EventCaller<T>

OptionType

Base class for Conditional and Choice options. Provides the method used for each to evaluate their conditions

ParameterBase
RandomOption
RandomRedirectObject
RedirectObject
ResponseInfo
ResponseParameters

Base class representing the parameters used by choice options

SequentialRedirectObject
SerializableDictionary<TKey, TValue>
SetVariableObject
StallObject
StartObject
TextObject

ScriptableObject representing a regular dialogue

TextParameters

Base class for Parameter types which require value replacements

TypeOptionAttribute
VariableContainer
VariableEqualsOption

Structs

SerializableKeyValuePair<TKey, TValue>
Variable

Interfaces

ICustomNodeStyle
IDialogueOutput

Interface for DialogueTrace classes which are meant to provide an output to AdvanceDialogue Currently limited to TextObject and ChoiceObject

IVariableContext

Enums

DialogueType

enum to designate the type of Dialogue

VariableType
Made with docfx
